tree.name: Bub Carrington
tree.tradeDescription: WAS traded Deni Avdija to POR for Malcolm Brogdon, Carlton Carrington (Bub), 2028 2nd (GSW), 2029 1st (POR), 2030 2nd (POR)
tree.note: Drafted #14 overall by POR in 2024, immediately traded to WAS in Deni Avdija deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Deni Avdija
assetsGivenUp.note: #9 overall pick by WAS in 2020 NBA Draft
